data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a human override and audit trail, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or testing of this requirement. The absence of any checks or reads related to human override and audit trail indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of human override and audit trail implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for human override and audit trail
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the human override and audit trail requirement.
